India Financial Calculators

Free online financial calculators for Indian investors and borrowers. Calculate your SIP returns, loan EMI, income tax, and more — all instant, no signup required.

Old vs New Tax Regime Comparator

Enter your deductions, see which regime saves more. Side-by-side comparison.

FIRE Calculator India

When can you retire early? Year-by-year progress tracker with Indian inflation adjustment.

Step-Up SIP Calculator

See how annual SIP increases create 2-3x more wealth than regular SIP.

Loan Comparison Tool

Compare 3 bank loan offers side-by-side. Find the cheapest deal instantly.

SIP Calculator

Calculate your Systematic Investment Plan returns over time.

EMI Calculator

Calculate loan EMI for home, car, or personal loans.

Income Tax Calculator

Slab-wise tax calculation under new regime FY 2025-26.

FD Calculator

Calculate Fixed Deposit maturity amount and interest earned.

PPF Calculator

Calculate PPF maturity value at current 7.1% rate over 15+ years.

Lump Sum Calculator

Calculate returns on a one-time mutual fund investment.
